description: Possibility means not-necessarily-not — unfolding the diamond.

guides.text: In modal logic, ◇A is defined as ¬□¬A. This problem proves one direction of that equivalence. If A is possible, then it's not the case that ¬A is necessary.
Discharge to get ◇A → ¬□¬A. The diamond definition, proven in 3 steps.
